corridorRatings.label: UAE → Pakistan
corridorRatings.register: MSB Compliance Risk Typology Register · 2026 US Treasury NMLRA overlay
corridorRatings.relevance: Top real-world remittance & hawala corridor; very-high TF/hawala density

corridorRatings.label: US → Pakistan
corridorRatings.relevance: Day-1 live corridor; hundi/hawala, TF/PF, charity/NPO abuse, TBML

contextFactors: Geo-strategic location and porous border with Afghanistan
Economic impact study: ~USD 38bn cumulative GDP decline during grey-list period
predicateOffencesHigh: Illicit trafficking in narcotic drugs and psychotropic substances
Trafficking in human beings and migrant smuggling
mlChannels: Real estate / precious metals / high-value assets

legalBasis: State Bank of Pakistan AML/CFT/CPF Regulations

supervisors.name: State Bank of Pakistan
supervisors.role: AML/CFT supervisor for banks, MFBs and EMIs

jurisdictionTypologies: Large undocumented cash economy and structuring
complianceModule.fatfNote: APG member; exited FATF increased monitoring Oct 2022 — confirm current status before country weighting

malTypologyCorpus.name: Hawala / hundi intersection
malTypologyCorpus.description: The account acts as the USD leg of an informal value-transfer book: assorted senders in, fan-out to multiple unrelated beneficiaries out.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Money-muling
malTypologyCorpus.description: Fraud/crime proceeds received as 'client payments' or 'salary' and rapidly forwarded.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Fictitious-invoice / fake-service laundering
malTypologyCorpus.description: Self-generated invoices, invoice reuse across payers; intangible-service analogue of trade-based ML.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Structuring / smurfing
malTypologyCorpus.description: Multiple small transactions kept below wallet-tier or reporting thresholds.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Pass-through with no economic rationale
malTypologyCorpus.description: Funds in and straight out with no business logic.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Sanctions / export-control evasion
malTypologyCorpus.description: Sanctioned end-clients via intermediaries; Pakistani documents + VPN; name-component omission; routing via non-sanctioned intermediary jurisdictions.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Terrorist-financing channel
malTypologyCorpus.description: Aggregation-then-forwarding; charity/NPO-purpose abuse; small-value patterns linked to high-risk provinces.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Tax evasion / purpose-code mislabelling
malTypologyCorpus.description: Large remittances to tax-unregistered individuals; remittance vs service-export misclassification (FBR/Payoneer pattern).

malTypologyCorpus.name: Fraud-proceeds placement
malTypologyCorpus.description: Romance / investment / job / BEC / APP scams — customers double-exposed as unwitting mules and victims.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Elderly victimisation / coerced transfers
malTypologyCorpus.description: Age-gap patterns, surname mismatch, relationship inconsistent with transaction; sender acting on third-party instruction.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Crypto layering / sanctioned-wallet exposure
malTypologyCorpus.description: Direct or indirect exposure to terrorism/sanctions-tagged wallet clusters; mixer-routed funds.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Many-to-one networking (iWRA)
malTypologyCorpus.description: Many unrelated senders funnel to one beneficiary over a rolling ~30-day window.

malTypologyCorpus.name: Wallet-tier structuring
malTypologyCorpus.description: Transactions sized to stay under mobile-wallet (JazzCash/Easypaisa) tier limits.

redFlags: EDD on PK-linked remittances; watch missing bank-settlement legs
Assorted senders in → fan-out to unrelated PK beneficiaries (hawala leg)
Remittance purpose inconsistent with declared profession / NTN status
Charity or NPO beneficiary without enhanced TF screening
Sub-threshold clustering toward JazzCash / Easypaisa wallets
Beneficiary in KPK / Balochistan with aggregation-then-forward pattern
Trade invoice reuse or intangible-service TBML indicators
VPN or geolocation mismatch on PK-linked onboarding
Stablecoin / USDC leg with indirect sanctioned-wallet exposure
Non-resident PK customer without permanent home-country address on file
nonDiscriminationPolicy: Mal does not de-risk by nationality; controls are behaviour- and corridor-based. Nationality and birthplace are used only for identity disambiguation and list-matching — never as a scored risk factor.
